title: Incident Timeline Formatter
description:
Each line is `unix_timestamp\tmessage` (tab-separated). Sort events by timestamp ascending and format each as `[HH:MM:SS] message` using UTC time.

Return an empty string for empty input.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.input:
1700000120	Alert fired
1700000000	Incident started
1700000060	Pager notified
examples.output:
[00:00:00] Incident started
[00:01:00] Pager notified
[00:02:00] Alert fired
examples.explanation: See test case: 3 events out of order

test_cases.input:
1700000120	Alert fired
1700000000	Incident started
1700000060	Pager notified
test_cases.expected_output:
[00:00:00] Incident started
[00:01:00] Pager notified
[00:02:00] Alert fired
